Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF LEVENTE FULOP'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint is Granted. The policy of liberally allowing amendments to pleadings and the absence of any prejudice to defendants strongly favors granting the motion. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
